items.title: Gave up 83 points to Bam Adebayo, fined $750,000 in January for not playing Boki Nachbar and Mike Penberthy in fourth quarters, and started 3-73 before winning the final three games, but nobody cared because Yuki Kawamura finished fourth in the league in assists.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Gave up 83 points to Bam Adebayo, fined $750,000 in January for not playing Boki Nachbar and Mike Penberthy in fourth quarters, and started 3-73 before winning the final three games, but nobody cared because Yuki Kawamura finished fourth in the league in assists.
